stories.title: Chat Visual Redesign with Glassmorphism
acceptanceCriteria: Chat bubble uses glassmorphism with backdrop-filter blur and warm gradient background
Chat panel has frosted glass effect (rgba(255,255,255,0.82) light / rgba(15,23,42,0.88) dark) with backdrop-filter: blur(24px)
User messages use warm dark gradient matching hero primary action style
Assistant messages use frosted glass card style with subtle border
Input area has rounded textarea with glass background and gradient send button
Dark mode fully supported with warm dark palette for all chat elements
Mobile responsive: chat goes full-screen below 767px

stories.title: Markdown Rendering in Chat Messages
acceptanceCriteria: Bold **text** renders as <strong> in assistant messages
Italic *text* renders as <em> in assistant messages
Inline `code` renders as styled <code> with background
Fenced code blocks with ``` render as <pre><code> with dark background and monospace font
Links [text](url) render as clickable <a> tags
Bare URLs still auto-detected and rendered as links (existing behavior preserved)
Code blocks have copy button in top-right corner
XSS-safe: only allowed HTML tags pass through (strong, em, code, pre, a, br, p)

stories.title: Chat Welcome Screen with Suggested Prompts
acceptanceCriteria: Welcome screen visible when chat opens with no message history
Welcome shows greeting text and 3-4 clickable suggested prompt chips
Suggested prompts read from data/chat.yaml suggestedPrompts array
Clicking a prompt chip populates input and triggers sendMessage()
Welcome screen hides permanently after first user message is sent
Prompt chips styled as pill buttons matching blog's quicklink aesthetic

stories.title: Chat Animations
acceptanceCriteria: Panel open/close uses CSS transitions (transform scale + translateY + opacity) instead of display toggle
Panel transition uses smooth 280ms cubic-bezier easing
New messages slide in from bottom with fade animation (0.3s ease)
Loading indicator uses refined gradient shimmer/pulse instead of bouncing dots
Thinking block expand/collapse animates height smoothly
All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query

stories.title: Frontend Polish (Non-Chat)
acceptanceCriteria: Card hover transitions use smoother easing curve
Smooth scroll behavior added for page navigation
Footer/pagination spacing normalized
No regressions to existing hero, card, or navigation styles
